title: Philips Sonicare Genuine A3 Premium All-in-One Replacement Toothbrush Heads, 2 Brush Heads, White, HX9092/65

Designed to work with all click-on Sonicare models, these brush heads remove up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush while gently improving gum health up to 15x in six weeks (vs. a manual toothbrush). Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.
features: Removes up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush
Up to 15x healthier gums in 6 weeks vs. a manual toothbrush
Triangular tips brush away stains for whiter teeth in just 2 days (vs. a manual toothbrush, with whitening toothpaste)
BrushSync mode-pairing & replacement reminders when used with a BrushSync compatible handle
Genuine Philips Sonicare rechargeable electric toothbrush head compatible with all Philips Sonicare click-on rechargeable toothbrush handles
Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

title: Kank-A Soft Brush Tooth Mouth Pain Gel Maximum Strength, White, 0.21 Oz, Pack of 3
description: Kank-A SoftBrush is the first oral pain treatment to deliver medication in a unique, self-contained brush-tipped dispenser. The sleek, pen-like applicator makes it easier than ever to comfortably and precisely target pain - including between teeth and braces. The no-drip, ultra-soft brush applies the pain-relieving gel evenly and directly to sore areas, with a comfortable touch that won't irritate or aggravate the area. SoftBrush delivers medication in a mild, pleasant tasting gel to treat pain caused by toothaches and minor irritation of the mouth and gums, including irritation from braces, dentures and other orthodontic appliances. The dual relief formula contains a maximum strength anesthetic combined with an active oral astringent for fast, effective relief.
features: 0.07 Ounce(pack of 3);PAIN RELIEF: Stops tooth and gum pain from toothaches, irritation from braces and dentures, and canker sores on contact
UNIQUE PEN-LIKE BRUSH APPLICATOR: Makes it easy to get to those hard to reach areas comfortably
DUAL MEDICATIONS: Combines two analgesics for dual relief
PLEASANT TASTE: SoftBrush gel formula has no unpleasant taste, tackiness, or sting
ON-THE-GO TREATMENT: Slender design fits well in hand and travels well in purse or pocket

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: Great value for the price, quantity, and quantity. Exactly what you’d get if you purchased in store. Helps with pain! Especially helps with pain from wisdom teeth. It does wear off, but I just reapply. FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS! Do not keep reapplying more than what is recommended!

reviews.title: This works for numbing
reviews.text: This really relieves the pain, at least for awhile.  I don't think it works so much to heal but no pain is a good thing.

reviews.title: Gets inbetween teeth well.
reviews.text: I tried it for my teeth pain, turns out i have Trigeminal neuralgia and im just feeling pain in my teeth, i gave it to my brother for his tooth pain, he ended up coming back for the other two (i ordered 3) works great. Gets in those hard to reach places.

reviews.title: Totally worth the price/for best results...dry your canker before applying gel
reviews.text:
I suffer from Canker sores all the time. I get them so bad, it hurts to even speak.
My sister actually turned me on to Kank-A Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel,. It really works.
Of course I had to figure out how to use it in a way that better suits me.
Best Way to use it: When you feel that canker coming on in your mouth....dry that area as much as possible. Use either a cotton ball or a tissue to dry the surface area where the sore is. The dryer the spot, the better contact you can make with the Kank-A SoftBrush Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel, Apply the gel directly to your canker sore and give it a little time to actually start drying on the sore. Sometimes you do have to sit there with your tongue out- but if you want to treat it fast and get the gel into the sore better, its worth it. Once the gel is pretty much set in, you can go back to your normal routine. You will have to reapply it a few times a day.
For the best maximum treatment and results, put it on your Canker right before going to sleep. The gel will have time to work its magic while you sleep...totally recommend using this.

reviews.title: Works great but not for long
reviews.text: It does numb the pain at first but doesn't last as long as the beads.  Maybe that's not the point... maybe it shouldn't last too long... it's a numbing agent.

It's sleek, compact and truly portable with a snap on vented mascara style cap keeping your toothbrush clean and dry. Bring the slim sonic toothbrush everywhere, at 6.5 inch high and 2 ounce it will fit in your purse, cosmetic case, backpack or briefcase for a healthy, sexy smile anywhere anytime.

So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush covers!
reviews.text:
Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well

And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

reviews.title: Compact design and long battery life is awesome!
reviews.text: I was looking for an electric toothbrush that I could Use in a small bath. The design is compact and the long battery life is perfect O that I do not have to leave the charger plugged in. I charge it approximately once a month and it works great!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush
reviews.text: Brought it as a Christmas gift and it was a hit. Great price too.

reviews.title: Effective, compact electric toothbrush with no cords to clutter
reviews.text: The charge from my USB port lasts about a week.  There are several settings for speeds and intensity.  It’s a powerful little brush.  You have to get use to the smaller size of the toothbrush head.  Because its smaller, you have to go slower over each section of your mouth but after you’re done teeth feel clean. I would buy this again.

title: LEYUYO Electric Toothbrush Kids Sonic Cleaning 31000 Strokes Rechargeable Tooth Brush with Timer, 2 Bristles, 3 Modes, Pink
features: 【360° SONIC CLEANING WITH 3 SIDED TOOTHBRUSH】: This sonic toothbrush pink with 3 sided 360°deep cleaning 31,000 micro-brushes per minute powerful ultrasonic technology, the kids will enjoy clean and get healthy teeth. With reduced noise, an overall upgrade over other regular electric toothbrushes.

【DOPONT BRISTLE WITH IPX7 WATERPROOF】:The whole electric toothbrush body with IPX7 waterproof, kids can use it at ease, easy to clean and very safe, can use even when in bath. With DuPont food-grade bristles, high-density and soft, will not hurt kids' Oral cavity, keep oral always healthy.

【RECHARGEABLE TOOTHBRUSH WITH LONG-LASTING BATTERY LIFE】: LEYUYO kids toothbrush only need 3-4 hours of charging, the battery life can last up to 30-40 days. Reduce the hassle of replacing batteries or charging frequently. Easy to use at home and travel, keep brushing kids' teeth every day.

【AUTOMATIC TIMER AND ANTI-SLIP HANDLE】: This sonic toothbrush with 2 minutes timer, 30s automatic zone change reminder with comfortable anti-slip handle, help kids brush their teeth more scientifically and cultivate good habit of brushing teeth.

【QUANLITY WARRANTY】: If there have any quality issues when you get the kids toothbrush electric, please do contact us anytime. We'll be glad to help you solve the problems.Your satisfaction is our ultimate goal.

reviews.title: Cute but a bit smaller than expected
reviews.text: This 3 pack baby toothbrushes are good and soft. They’re easy to hold and grab for kids. However,  they appear a bit smaller in person than the picture. Which is why they can’t get to all the areas of the mouth properly. They make good teething tool and starter toothbrushes for kids close to 12 months or so.

reviews.title: They are handy
reviews.text: These are really cute and logical. My toddler won't use them( we been having trouble getting him to let me brush his teeth) I'm going to try them on my other baby when his mouth is bigger

reviews.title: Cute

title: Replacement Brush Heads Compatible with Oral B- Double Clean Design, Double Clean Brush Heads, Compatible with Braun Oral-B Dual Clean Electric Toothbrush (16-Pack)
description: Our Double Clean replacement brush head for rotary electric toothbrush features dual action for a superior clean vs a regular manual toothbrush. Its unique technology oscillates, allowing the bristles to surround each tooth for an amazing, tooth-by-tooth clean. Fits the following electric rechargeable toothbrush models: Oral-B Vitality Series: Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Sensitive Gum Care, Vitality Sensitive Clean, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Crossaction Oral-B Genius Series: Genius Pro 8000, Genius 9600, Genius X 10000, Genius X 10000 Luxe Edition Oral-B Smart Series Pro Series: Pro 500 Precision Clean, 550, 600, Pro 1000, Pro 1500, Pro 2000, Pro 3000, Pro 3250, Pro 4000, Pro 4750, Pro 5000, Pro 5500, Pro 6000, Pro 6500, Pro 7000, Pro 7400, Pro 7500, Pro 7550, Pro 7850, Pro 8000, Pro 8300, Pro 8500, Pro 8860, Pro 8875, Pro 8900, Pro 8950, 3D Excel, 3D Plaque Control Oral-B Triumph Professional Care Series: 9000, 9100, 9400, 9425, 9450, 9475, 9500, 9900, 9910, 9930, 9950 Oral-B Kids Pro Health Stages Power: Frozen, Princess, Finding Dory, Star Wars, Cars & Planes, Pro Health Jr. Frozen, Avengers, Mickey Mouse Oral-B Kids Electric Toothbrush with Coaching Pressure Sensor and Timer Oral-B Advance Power: 400, 450, 450TX, 800, 850, 900, 950, 950TX Oral-B Trizone: 600, 1000, 3000, 5000
features: FULL COMPATIBLIITY: Double Clean generic brushes are compatible with all genuine Oral-B electric toothbrushes, except Pulsonic, such as the Pro 500 1000 1500 3000 5000 6000 7000 8000, Pro-Health, White, Vitality and Triumph. [Please review the below listing for all compatible devices]

TOP QUALITY BRISTLES: Generic Double Clean replacement brush heads for Oralb– twice the cleaning action with 2 simultaneously moving brushes. The generic double clean brushes oscillate, rotate and pulsate, so that the bristles surround each tooth for a superior clean.
COLOR CODED: Each brush has a different color-coded identification ring so that you can share this set with the whole family.
16-PACK: Included 16pcs Dual Clean toothbrush heads allow you to replace at any time

INSTALL & CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Just pull your old brush head and snap the new one on, easily and smoothly. If have any problem of them, just reach out to our customer service team (By contacting the seller in your order info), and we will work with you to ensure your satisfaction!

Dental professionals across the world recommend tongue brushing as an important part of your daily oral care regime. Dentists and hygenists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months.

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I was given one by my oral surgeon and have since used nothing else. Used properly gives you a clean like you just left the hygienist.

reviews.title: My dentist recommends!
reviews.text: This is the toothbrush my dentist recommends. I really, really like it! I'm very glad to have found it here so I can change it out as often as she wants me to.

reviews.title: Love these toothbrushes
reviews.text: Have used them for years!

reviews.title: Nothing special, won't buy again
reviews.text:
I could find nothing particularly special about these. They don't clean my teeth better than any other toothbrush thar I have picked up at the grocery store in the past.
Not worth the price. They aren't angled properly to reach the base of my back teeth. Regret getting these vs something like a "Reach" brand that is angled.

reviews.title: Very soft bristles
reviews.text: I always love the Soft toothbrush my dentist gave me.  They changed it so I had to search for different soft toothbrushes for myself.  Found these and it’s definitely very soft bristles.  Highly recommended.  They give you five in package.

title: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium
description: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.

title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.title: Watered down toothpaste
reviews.text: This sucks.  Watered down toothpaste.  A way for you to save product and sale for more. Does nothing for whitening as the product is way too watery.

reviews.title: I Really like It
reviews.text: I bought this to use with my hands-free BLU toothbrush in Dec. This is a refill b/c 1st came with in kit. Love the taste and has whitened my teeth nicely. Took a week to get used to a new Toothpaste, now love it

reviews.title: BLECH!
reviews.text: Although this looks exactly like the whitening foam that came in the kit, this one tastes like SOAP! Like, something you should NOT put in your mouth. I was really disappointed.

This product is better than the expensive one I bought from my dentist. It’s great.
The instructions for use weren’t great, but Customer Service was very accommodating.

title: SHNOKER Toothbrush,Ultrasonic Automatic Toothbrush,IPX7 Waterproof,Three Clearing Modes,Cartoon Modeling Design for Kids (Blue 3-6 Year)
features: 【LOVELY CARTOON DESIGN TO ENHANCE THE FUN OF BRUSHING TEETH】 The cute cartoon design make this lovely automatic toothbrush attractive to all kids, they are excited to brush the teeth with this funny toothbrush, easy and fun for little brusher ages 3 and up. This help your kids be willing to brush teeth longer even develop healthy brushing habits.

【IPX7 WATERPROOF】IPX7 waterproof sealing design is adopted, and babies can also use it when bathing. The product can be placed in a water depth of 1 meter and soaked for 15 minutes, and the product is still in normal use without being damaged.

【FAST CHARGING】 The ultrasonic toothbrush is equipped with fast charging cable, which can be discharged and charged instantly. The LED lights on when USB charging is connected, and it only needs to be charged for 3 hours and can be used for 1 week. Safe, fast and convenient, easy to use at home or travel.

【UNIQUE U-SHAPED DESIGN】 Ergonomic U-shaped brush head, suitable for the shape and mechanics of children's teeth structure. Soft pacifier grade silicone, soft brim around the teeth 360 degrees, providing a comfortable feeling of brushing, the original V-shaped cleaning path, effective deep cleaning, will not harm the gums, protect children's enamel.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODE】Our automatic toothbrush can promote the health of gums and teeth through different functional modes : 1. Strong mode for powerful teeth brushing; 2. Medium mode for comfortable teeth brushing; 3. Massage mode for gum massage.50 secs scientific timing for each brushing, it stops automatically, Parents don’t have to face to face to urge children to brush their teeth.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: My eldest has a difficult time with the sensation of anything against his gums.  This results in nasty plaque.  I was hopeful that this would be a solution but it's not.  Expensive let down.

reviews.title: Worked great for 3 months
reviews.text: Worked great for 3 months. Then stopped working even though it was fully charged.

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth
reviews.text:
Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: My kids absolutely love these. The brush their teeth everyday without a fight. I love them they are small perfect for kid hands and super easy to use.

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: The handle is kinda weird to hold onto.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

reviews.title: getting hard to find these
reviews.text: it's getting hard to find these brushes WITHOUT the stupid rubber parts on the sides, so when i find them, i buy a few packs.  these are better than the last ones i had - there's a rough texture on the back of the brush head (raised less than 1mm) that feels nice against the inside of my cheek while brushing - probably also good to clean your tongue.

reviews.title: Wonderful toothbrushes.
reviews.text: Works great and does not flex, very sturdy.

reviews.title: I like the feel of this toothbrush- BUT....
reviews.text:
Within maybe a week to 10 days, it already looks worn out and may not be cleaning as well. I may try a 2nd brush but if it's not any better, these are going back to the big box store that starts with a C that I bought them at.

Not sure if the medium would be better or not. I may call Oral B and/or I may try another brand and/or return them.
